race.description: Cafe Nosh Country Boosted Maiden Hcp
race.comment: COURSE OF ACTION (1) wasn't far away on debut last start over 1400m at Scone, finishing second. Hails from a leading barn and is open to sharp improvement. Can get off the mark this time. ZORKO (3) was well in commission on his debut over 1100m at Mudgee back on September 7 but failed to meet expectations when finishing sixth. Readied with a soft trial and the blinkers come off. From a smart camp and willing to give another chance, especially if there's support for him. WHATSTHETIMEMRWOLF (13) progressed nicely last start to finish a close second at Grafton. Has found the maiden win elusive but is rock-hard fit and deserves consideration. MS HUBBLE (10)only warmed late when running into second first-up at Port Mac. Is sure to have come on from that and is among the main hopes.
